prediction.reasoning: This prediction is based on a statistical model using historical volatility, rather than fundamental or technical analysis. The point estimate assumes a modest positive drift over 18 days. The confidence intervals are calculated using an annualized volatility of approximately 28% for AAPL, scaled to an 18-day period, and assume a log-normal distribution for price changes. Stock prices are inherently volatile and subject to numerous unpredictable market factors, so actual prices may fall outside these intervals.
